text: Testing plays a crucial role in software development. Unit tests check individual pieces of code, such as functions or methods, to ensure they work correctly on their own. Integration tests go further by verifying that different parts of an application work together smoothly. Many developers use test-driven development, where they write a test before writing the code itself. This approach helps them think carefully about what the code should do. Together, these practices give developers confidence. When a change is made, running all the tests quickly shows if anything has broken. This makes it safer to add new features and improve existing ones.
